create_hypertube.ponder.accelerator.head: Hypertube Accelerators
create_hypertube.ponder.accelerator.text: Hypertube Accelerators increase the speed of entities traveling the Hypertube.
You can change to BRAKE mode by Right Clicking the Accelerator.
create_hypertube.ponder.attachments.head: Hypertube Attachments
create_hypertube.ponder.attachments.text: The Scanner Attachment allows you to detect entities traveling the Hypertube. (8 power for babies and 15 for adults)
You can also place attachments in accelerators, in any side at the same time.
The Redstone Detector Attachment allows you to change the Accelerator/Entrance mode with a Redstone signal.
create_hypertube.ponder.entrance.text_1: Hypertube Entrances connect to the Hypertube network, allowing high-speed travel.
create_hypertube.ponder.entrance.text_2: To be able to enter the Hypertube, you need to power with at least 16 RPM.
create_hypertube.ponder.entrance.text_3: The faster it spins, the faster you can travel.
create_hypertube.ponder.entrance.text_4: You can change the entrance mode by Right Clicking it with a Wrench.
create_hypertube.ponder.simple_tube.head: Creating a Hypertube
create_hypertube.ponder.simple_tube.text: To create a Hypertube connection, Just Right Click the tube while holding another tube.
And you have a Hypertube connection!
You can connect already placed tubes.
You can change tube segment count with the wrench.
